title: Untitled
content: Coding Society JUIT Backed by the Computer Science Department of JUIT , our Coding Society is started with the vision to establish and improve the coding skills of students. Our mission is to create a diverse learning community where we help each other to attain command in competitive programming. The society also aims to build a healthy competitive environment among the students. We value the power of influence. We believe our society will lead to the foundation of great coders from within the university. The Coding Society is the place to take that interest in technology, and turn it into a productive skill.
